description: This absolutely stylish pair of Coral flip flops from puma offers comfort at its best. The floral design on the footbed and the velvetty straps renders it a touch of royalty. With circular grooves on the outsole offering an absolutely grippy stability, it makes for a great pool and beachwear too.UpperQuick-drying EVA upper for dry comfort for the feet Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and style Velvetty straps for soft, comfort and stylish feelSoft, cushioned EVA footbed for step-in comfort Floral prints on the footbed for styleOutsoleTPR outsole with circular suction lugs for grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
